name: pm-solution-design
description: Use when starting a product initiative, writing or reviewing a PRD, clarifying ambiguous requirements, planning a feature, or comparing product trade-offs.

interface.shortDescription: PRD and product solution design driven by a flow engine
interface.longDescription: Use pm-solution-design 2.0.1 to clarify product problems, choose output scope, pass G1-G4 gates, and produce a PRD, solution brief, or explicit draft without leaking API, data model, or estimate details.
